linux.changelog:
Added Auto-Update System:
- Automatic Update Checks: Optional update checks on startup (configurable in Settings)
- Manual Control: Check for Updates button in Settings tab for on-demand checks
- Smart Download Manager: Real-time progress tracking with download speed (KB/s), percentage, and total data transferred

Most of this is bare mimium imlementation just to get some online updates going. Will be refined as needed.

windows.changelog:
## What's New in v1.2.3

- Added automatic update checking system
- Added install-on-exit option for non-disruptive updates
- Added progress tracking for downloads
- Improved settings persistence
- Bug fixes and performance improvements
